titleStmt.title: SII 24.523: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 523. (A.R. No. 8 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, EAST AND NORTH WALLS

summary.p: Registers an endowment of 120 poṉ from out of the interest on which certain offerings were to be made to the god during the recitation (Tiruvadhyayana) of Tiruvāymoḻi along with other sacred verses on the day of the asterism Tiruvādirai of Emberumānār (Rāmānuja) in the month of Chittirai and the offerings distributed among the Śrīvaishṇavas, pilgrims and Ēkāṅkis. The gift was made by Jīyyar Rāmānuja-Jīyyar alias Rāmānujadāsa in the name of his esteemed guru Yatīndrapravaṇa-prabhāva Piḷḷai Lōkāchārya-Jīyyar, himself a disciple of Paravastu Nayinār-āchārya of Tiruvēṅgaḍam. This record is a good specimen of the maṇipravāḷa style which is a characteristic of Vaishṇava literature. The record quotes the Divya-śrīsūkti (i.e., Nālāyira-divyaprabandham) of Periyāḻvār in giving the ingredients of the preparation called Akkāravaḍiśil which is referred to in the work as Tiruvōṇam. In describing Rāmānuja extracts from Rāmānuja-nūṟṟantādi are freely quoted. The record ends with a Sanskrit ślōka written in Grantha invoking prosperity to Rāmānuja's teachings. The details of the date viz., Śaka 1534, Paridhāvi, Mēsha, śu. 3, Thursday, Rōhiṇī regularly correspond to A.D. 1612, April 23; ·86; ·22.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvaran śrīvīrapratāpa śrīviraveṅkaṭapatidevamahārāyan pṛthivirājyam paṇṇā niṉṟa śakābdam 1000 5 100 3 10 4 Itan melc cellāniṉṟa paridhāvi samvatsśarattu meṣanāyattu pūrvapakṣattu tritiyaiyum guruvāramum peṟṟa rohiṇinakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇḍikulāśani vaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷanāṭu tiruvaraṅkantiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar śrībhaṇṭārattukku veṅkaṭattaippatiyāka vāḻum paravastunayinārācāryyaruṭaiya śrīpādābjamadhuvratarāy dhatīndrapravaṇapra bhāvarāy Eḻuntaruḷiyirukkiṟa piḷḷai lokācāryyajīyyaruṭaiya śrīpādattil rāmānujadāsanjiyyar rāmānujajiyyaren deṇḍaṉ samarppittu poliyūṭṭuśilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttappaṭi [.] Aṭiyeṉuṭaiya Ācāryyamukhollāsamāka śrīraṅgarājacaraṇāmbujarājahamsarāy śrīmatparāṅkuśapadāmbuja bhṛṅgarājarāy palkalaiyor tāmeṉṉa vantu Aṉaittulakum vāḻappiṟantu teṉṉaraṅkar celvam muṟṟum tiruttivittu poṉṉaraṅkameṉṉil mayale perukum svāmi Emperumāṉāruṭaiya cittirai māsam tiruvātirai tiruvaddhyayanam cāttumuṟai mutalnāḷ Āṟāntiruvaddhyayanam polika polika tiruvāymoḻi ciṟappu Amutu ceytaruḷumpaṭikku poliyūṭṭāka perumāḷ śrībhaṇṭārattil Aṭiyen varkkam mutaliṭṭa poṉ 100 2 10 Intap poṉ nūṟṟirupatukku mātam Oṉṟukku pattup poṉṉukku
Oṉṟekālppaṇam vaṭṭiyāka vaṭṭiyilkkūṭiṉa poṉ 10 8 Intap poṉ patineṭṭukkum cittirai māsam svāmi Emperumāṉāruṭaiya Āṭṭait tirunakṣatra tiruvaddhyayanam Āṟāntiruvaddhyayanattil polika polikaic ciṟappu svāmi namperumāḷ Amutu ceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa Akkāravaṭicil taḷikai patiṉañcukku taḷikai Oṉṟukkup paṇam pattāka poṉ 10 5 nācciyār śrīraṅganāyakiyār Amutu ceytaruḷum Akkāravaṭicilt taḷikai Āṟukkut taḷikai Oṉṟukkuppaṇam Añcu Āka poṉ 3 Ākat taḷikai Irupattoṉṟukku vilaippaṭi poṉ 10 8 Intap poṉ patineṭṭukku Inta vaṭṭiyil Utaiyam koṇṭe varuṣam varuṣam toṟum svāmi namperumāḷ Amutu ceytaru ḷumpaṭi “ceṉṉelarici ciṟu paruppuc ceyta vakkāram naṟu ney pālāl” Eṉkiṟa divyaśrīsūktiyin paṭiye Akkāravaṭicil ceṟṟiyuṭaṉe Amutuceytaruḷi svāmi Emperumāṉāṟku Aṟitittiru pariyaṭṭam tirumālai mutalāka Alaṅkārattuṭaṉe vantu polikait tiruvāymoḻit tokkattukku svāmi Emperumāṉār Amutu ceytaruḷi śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷukku viniyogamākak kaṭavatākavum . Itukku varum viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu periyakoyil taḷikai Oṉṟarai nācciyār koyil taḷikai Arai Ākat taḷikai Iraṇṭukku śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷukku viṉiyoka mākiṟatuṭaṉe kūṭa viṉiyoka mākak kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa periya koyil taḷikai Arai nācciyār koyilt taḷikai Arai Ākat taḷikai Oṉṟum poka niṉṟa periyakoyil taḷikai Oṉṟum svāmi Emperumāṉār tiruolakattile tecāntirikaḷāṉa jiyyāḷ Ekāṅkikaḷ Aṉaivarum viṉi
yokam paṇṇikkoḷḷak kaṭavarākavum . palluyirkkum vīṭaḷippārāy viṇṇiṉ talainiṉṟu maṇṇiṉ talattutittu maṟaiṉālum vaḷarttu moympāl vaḷartta Itattāyāṉa svāmi rāmānujācāryyar tiruvuḷḷattukku Ukappāṉa Inta polika polikait tiruvāymoḻic ciṟappup poliyūṭṭu Ācandrārkkasthāyi Āka naṭantuvarak kaṭavatākavum . Ippaṭi sammatittup poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar śrībhaṇṭārattukku yatīndrapravaṇaprabhāvapiḷḷai lokācārya jiyyaruṭaiya śrīpādattil rāmānujadāsanāna Aṭiyen jiyyar rāmānujajiyyareṉ svāmi śrībhāṣyakārarukku tiruvuḷḷamāyirukkiṟa Inta polika polikai tiruvāymoḻic ciṟappu śrīvaiṣṇavarakṣai . sarvadeśadaśākāleṣvavyāhataparākramā . rāmānujāryyadivyājñāvarddhatāmabhiva rddhatām . Inta poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikku koyil kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 24.523 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
